// Code generated by github.com/romshark/datapages; DO NOT EDIT.

// Package href provides generators for datastar anchor hypertext references.
// These references must be used in the templates.
package href

import (
	"strconv"
	"strings"
)

// Toggle references /toggle/{on}/{$}
func Toggle(on bool) string {
	s_on := strconv.FormatBool(on)
	var b strings.Builder
	b.Grow(
		len("/toggle/") +
			len(s_on) +
			len("/"),
	)
	b.WriteString("/toggle/")
	b.WriteString(s_on)
	b.WriteString("/")
	return b.String()
}
